message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: Running kfctl apply k8s fails on 2nd application mission (#640)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-3810-running-kfctl-apply-k8s-fails-on-2nd-application",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: Running kfctl apply k8s fails on 2nd application",
+    "description": "Running kfctl apply k8s fails on 2nd application. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**What steps did you take and what happened:**\nI ran `kfctl apply k8s` a 2nd time and it failed saying istio had already bound the port."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Running kfctl apply k8s fails on 2nd application",
+        "description": "+1 to that. I think coloring the did to apply is getting hairy and will end\nup replicating kubectl.\n\nOn Fri, Aug 9, 2019 at 1:55 PM Matt Brown <notifications.com> wrote:\n\n> Has it ever been considered to shell out to kubectl apply ... rather than\n> have client-go code in kfctl that talks to the k8s\n```yaml\napiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1\nkind: Kustomization\nnamespace: kf-demo\nresources:\n- https://github.com/kubeflow/manifests/blob/master/pipeline/pipelines-ui/base/kustomization.yaml\ngenerators:\n- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe/pipelines/app.yaml\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Running kfctl apply k8s fails on 2nd application is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "+1 to that. I think coloring the did to apply is getting hairy and will end\nup replicating kubectl.\n\nOn Fri, Aug 9, 2019 at 1:55 PM Matt Brown <notifications.com> wrote:\n\n> Has it ever been considered to shell out to kubectl apply ... rather than\n> have client-go code in kfctl that talks to the k8s api-server directly?\n>\n> —\n> You are receiving this because you were mentioned.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1\nkind: Kustomization\nnamespace: kf-demo\nresources:\n- https://github.com/kubeflow/manifests/blob/master/pipeline/pipelines-ui/base/kustomization.yaml\ngenerators:\n- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe/pipelines/app.yaml",
+        "apiVersion: kfdef.apps.kubeflow.org/v1alpha1\nkind: KfDef\nmetadata:\n  creationTimestamp: null\n  name: dls-kf\n  namespace: kubeflow\nspec:\n  appdir: /Users/joe/kf\n  applications:\n  - kustomizeConfig:\n      overlays:\n      - istio\n      repoRef:\n        name: manifests\n        path: pipeline/pipelines-ui\n    name: pipelines-ui"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubeflow",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubeflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/3810",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 40,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubeflow installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:25:20.945Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
